name: avatar-foundry
description: Autonomous Executive Assistant with HD Avatar - Microsoft Foundry Showcase

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w client && npm run clean -w server
